channel.title: ALL LIST - MORAGS DAILY PODCASTS
channel.description: Morag's daily podcast feed - AI Daily Brief, Nate B Jones, and MoPods originals
channel.itunes:author: Morag

item.title: [AIDB] The AI Subsidy Era is Over
item.description: The AI discount is ending as agentic usage drives token consumption through the roof, forcing companies from GitHub to Anthropic to rethink pricing, limits, and compute access.

item.title: [NBJ] GPT-5.5 vs Claude vs Gemini: The Real Difference Nobody's Talking About
item.description: What's really happening inside the GPT-5.5 release when everyone is comparing benchmark deltas but missing that the floor moved?

item.title: [AIDB] How DeepSeek V4 Connects to the US Power Grid
item.description: Today's episode connects two stories that look unrelated on the surface - the White House invoking the Defense Production Act around US grid infrastructure, and DeepSeek's long-awaited V4 release.

item.title: [NBJ] OpenAI Just Gave Every Team a Free Employee. Here's the Catch.
item.description: What's really happening inside ChatGPT's new Workspace Agents launch? The common story is that this is just a chatbot upgrade - but the reality is more interesting.

item.title: [NBJ] Apple Just Positioned Itself for the Next Trillion Dollars
item.description: What's really happening inside Apple's AI strategy behind the scenes.
